prestazioni: LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant) forced induction via Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (12psi boost, 650whp on E85) with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.0:1 CR), Callies Compstar crankshaft, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and ARP L19 head studs. Supporting mods include a Holley Dominator EFI ECU with custom LS3-specific calibration by HP Tuners, dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, and ID1000 injectors.

Drivetrain reinforcement: Harrop heavy-duty 9.5-inch differential with 3.73:1 gearing, billet steel diff cover, and C&R Racing 4-core transmission cooler. Upgraded to a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual with a twin-disc SPEC Stage 3+ clutch and lightweight aluminum flywheel.

Suspension and handling: KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable) with custom VF Ute-specific valving, Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings. Braking upgraded to AP Racing CP8650 6-piston front calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a Wilwood master cylinder and braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using VF Ute-specific Rocket Bunny/Pandem overfenders (30mm wider front, 50mm wider rear) with carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Seibon. Rear bed replaced with a carbon fiber tonneau cover by Carbon Revolution, featuring integrated LED brake light strip.

OEM+ aggressive styling: Holden HSV GTS-spec front bumper with integrated LED daytime running lights, custom carbon fiber hood with heat extractor vents (functional, ducted to Harrop supercharger), and HSV GTS rear bumper with quad-exit exhaust cutouts. Painted in Holden factory 'Phantom Black' with custom matte gold HSV stripes and pinstriping by VHT.

Interior overhaul: Recaro Pole Position seats (VF Ute-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara with red stitching, custom roll cage by Autopower (bolt-in, 6-point) with harness bar, and MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel. Gauges upgraded to a Motec C127 dash with AIM MXS Strada data logger, mounted in a custom carbon fiber gauge pod.
